detail.description:
Critical Strike CS:Go and try the Ultimate FPS Shooter Experience!
 Are you ready for the ultimate FPS shooter experience on mobile? Critical Strike is the #1 counter-terrorist strike game that brings real CS style shooting action to your fingertips. Join millions of players worldwide and prove you're the best shooter on the battlefield.
 THE REAL COUNTER-TERRORIST STRIKE GAME
 Step into the boots of an elite counter-terrorist operative and face off against terrorist forces in intense FPS combat
detail.recentChanges:
Last Portrait Season Has Begun! 🖼️🖌️
New Weapon: AK-205 🔫🎯
New Weapon Blueprints: Painted Requiem 🥀 & Azure 🐦‍🔥
New Character Blueprint: Noir ⏱️🦯
New Helmet, Armor, Glove, Boot & Consumables 🛡️🏰🧪
New Battle Pass, Seasonal Draw & Lucky Draw ⚔️⚜️🔮
Clan Capacity Upgrade System 👥👥⏫
Improvements ⚙️
Bug fixes 🔧
Facebook: http://facebook.com/criticalstrikegame
Discord: https://discord.gg/criticalstrike
